title: Board Approved IT Strategy
rationale: Requires Board approval and strategic alignment - organizational process

title: IT Strategy Committee of the Board
rationale: Organizational structure - requires governance documentation review

title: Chief Information Officer (CIO)
rationale: Organizational role - requires personnel and reporting structure review

title: Chief Information Security Officer (CISO)
rationale: Organizational role - requires personnel independence verification

title: Information Security Policy
rationale: Policy document - requires Board approval and content review

title: Cyber Security Policy
rationale: Policy document - requires review of detection, response, recovery procedures

title: Cyber Crisis Management Plan
rationale: Incident response plan - requires plan review and testing verification

title: Cyber Incident Reporting to RBI
rationale: Process control - requires procedure documentation and reporting history review

title: Access Control
azure_policies: MFA should be enabled on accounts with write permissions
MFA should be enabled on accounts with owner permissions
A maximum of 3 owners should be designated for your subscription

title: Patch Management
azure_policies: System updates should be installed on your machines
Vulnerabilities in security configuration should be remedied

title: Anti-Malware Protection
azure_policies: Endpoint protection should be installed on your machines
Monitor missing Endpoint Protection in Azure Security Center

title: Network Security
azure_policies: All network ports should be restricted
Internet-facing virtual machines should be protected with network security groups
Management ports should be closed on your virtual machines

title: Encryption
azure_policies: Transparent Data Encryption on SQL databases should be enabled
Storage accounts should use customer-managed key for encryption
Disk encryption should be applied on virtual machines

title: Secure Software Development

checks.description: Ecr Image Scan On Push Enabled
Ecr Image Scan On Push Enabled
Ecr Image Scan On Push Enabled
Ecr Image Scan On Push Enabled
Ecr Image Scan On Push Enabled
Ecr Image Scan On Push Enabled

azure_policies: Vulnerabilities in container security configurations should be remedied

title: Social Media Usage Policy
rationale: Policy and process control - requires documentation review

title: System and Data Backup
azure_policies: Azure Backup should be enabled for Virtual Machines
Long-term geo-redundant backup should be enabled for databases

title: Logging and Monitoring
azure_policies: Activity log should be retained for at least one year

title: Annual IS Audit
rationale: Requires independent auditor engagement and audit report review

title: IS Audit Scope
rationale: Audit scope definition - requires planning documentation review

title: Computer Assisted Audit Techniques (CAATs)
rationale: Audit methodology - requires audit procedure documentation review

title: Business Continuity Plan
rationale: Requires BCP documentation, Board approval, and testing evidence review

title: Business Impact Analysis
rationale: Requires BIA documentation and critical system identification review

title: Disaster Recovery Site
azure_policies: Geo-redundant backup should be enabled for databases

title: BCP Testing
rationale: Requires BCP test documentation and results review

title: IT Outsourcing Policy
rationale: Policy document - requires Board approval and content review

title: Outsourcing Contracts
rationale: Contract review - requires legal counsel verification and audit rights

title: Outsourcing Risk Management
rationale: Risk management process - requires governance documentation review

title: Service Provider BCP
rationale: Third-party BCP assessment - requires vendor documentation review

title: IT Policy for Smaller NBFCs
rationale: Policy document - requires Board approval and content review

title: BCP for Smaller NBFCs
rationale: BCP documentation - requires Board review and testing evidence
